items.quote: The baby blanket made me cry — her name in that soft rose script was more beautiful than I imagined. It's already the most treasured thing in the nursery.
items.name: Placeholder — Sarah M.

items.quote: Ordered twelve monogrammed napkins for my daughter's bridal shower and they were flawless. Fast, kind, and the stitching is gorgeous up close.
items.name: Placeholder — Janet R.

items.quote: They took our messy logo sketch and turned it into crisp embroidery on twenty crewnecks. The proof process made it easy — zero surprises.
items.name: Placeholder — Mike D.
